keywords.job: I am the captain of the Poodle, the proudest ship on all oceans.
keywords.name: It's Charles.
keywords.king: His majesty himself was present at the day the Poodle was launched.
keywords.jungle: It's a fascinating forest, full of exotic life. If it weren't for my duties, I would spend some time just exploring this jungle.
keywords.tibia: We live in a fascinating world with even more fascinating oceans. And all its major harbours are known to me.
keywords.major: Well the harbours of thais, venore, carlin, edron, darashia and ankrahmun. Do you have any questions about one of those harbours?
keywords.harbour: Well the harbours of thais, venore, carlin, edron, darashia and ankrahmun. Do you have any questions about one of those harbours?
keywords.kazordoon: An inland town of dwarves, somewhere in the middle of nowhere.
keywords.dwarves: It's fun to see a seasoned dwarven fighter turnining into a shivering green something as soon as we get a mild breeze on sea.
keywords.dwarfs: It's fun to see a seasoned dwarven fighter turnining into a shivering green something as soon as we get a mild breeze on sea.
keywords.ab\u0027dendriel: My visits there were interesting and I learnt a lot about the elves and their city. I can only recommend a visit there and if it is only to admire the amazing architectural style in which the city was built.
keywords.elves: Elves are very special creatures. They keep in touch with nature almost like druids. Although I don't really understand their way of life, I think we could learn one or two things of them.
keywords.elfs: Elves are very special creatures. They keep in touch with nature almost like druids. Although I don't really understand their way of life, I think we could learn one or two things of them.
keywords.darama: I sailed around the whole continent once and I have seen many of its wonders. For sure there are more waiting to be discovered.
keywords.ferumbras: He is that for the land what giant sea serpents are for the sea.
keywords.excalibug: You better ask some knight about it.
keywords.apes: I would love to catch a living exemplar and bring it to Thais so the king could see it.
keywords.lizard: They have a small settlement in the southeast of the jungle next to the coast. It looks somewhat primitive but there is evidence it was erected only recently.
keywords.dworcs: They attacked us when we set our feet on the south shore of the continent. They are poison using savages, nothing more.
keywords.thais: Do you seek a passage to Thais for 150 gold?
keywords.darashia: Do you seek a passage to Darashia for 170 gold?
keywords.edron: Do you seek a passage to Edron for 140 gold?
keywords.venore: Do you seek a passage to Venore for 150 gold?
keywords.ankrahmun: Do you seek a passage to Ankrahmun for 100 gold?
keywords.passenger: We would like to welcome you on board.
keywords.trip: Where do you want to go? To Thais, Darashia, Venore, Ankrahmun or Edron?
keywords.route: Where do you want to go? To Thais, Darashia, Venore, Ankrahmun or Edron?
keywords.passage: Where do you want to go? To Thais, Darashia, Venore, Ankrahmun or Edron?
keywords.town: Where do you want to go? To Thais, Darashia, Venore, Ankrahmun or Edron?
keywords.destination: Where do you want to go? To Thais, Darashia, Venore, Ankrahmun or Edron?
keywords.sail: Where do you want to go? To Thais, Darashia, Venore, Ankrahmun or Edron?
keywords.go: Where do you want to go? To Thais, Darashia, Venore, Ankrahmun or Edron?

texts: I am the captain of the Poodle, the proudest ship on all oceans.

entries.response: Set the sails!

We would like to serve you some time.

The Venorans build fine ships. Enough said about them.
Thais is the proud capital of the largest kingdom in the known world.
Rebellious women might be amusing for a while, but it is time for them to stop this nonsense and return to the kingdom.
The coastline of Edron is treacherous and it takes some skills to sail a ship safely into the harbour.
An unremarkable little town with a small harbour and quiet people.
The city is surely worth a look although its inhabitants are somewhat strange and their customs oddish.
I'm sorry, but you need a premium account in order to travel on board of our ships.
You don't have enough money.
We would like to serve you some time.
